basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 4 Faculty (Civil Engineering) vacancies on a temporary basis with salary up to Rs. 70,000 per month.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 50,000/- per month with Master's degree and Rs. 70,000/- per month with a Ph.D. Degree

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: NIT Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
